index.description: Move from one technology / process / contract to another with continuity. Output is the cutover completed cleanly. Framework upgrades, monolith→service splits, vendor switches, process change rollouts, schema migrations, repo moves.

playbook.summary: Fragmented per-dev tooling → all 2-10 devs reference the same faion playbook set with company-specific overlays cleanly shadowing defaults.
All 2-10 devs reference the same playbook set; company-specific overlays (security policy, ADR template, RFC format, internal tech-radar) cleanly shadow faion defaults without forking the corpus
"Project-heavy revenue mix to at least 50% recurring revenue and 40% less founder delivery time in 6 months."

"Move the agency from majority project-based revenue to majority retainer/productized recurring revenue. Outcome: at least 50% MRR-style recurring by month 6, founder time spent on delivery cut by 4..."
Cross-quarter migration completes with zero data loss, proven rollback, bounded dual-stack window, and clean post-migration audit.

"Cross-quarter migration completes with zero data loss, rollback path proven, dual-stack period bounded, all squads informed. Output: pre-migration baseline, dual-write/shadow-read evidence, cutover..."
"Token + component library evolved to v2: semantic + modes taxonomy, versioned components, consumer apps migrated, drift dashboard live."
End-of-engagement transition → client team (or another vendor) takes over → no Slack call to the outgoing dev for 30 days, AI agent on the receiving side answers correctly using the handover pack.

"Across two quarters, parallel to delivery work: pick one client-pain pattern, validate it as a productized SaaS, ship a paid v1 to 5-10 customers, and decide whether to scale, sunset, or fold into..."

"Freelance-to-SaaS transition (6-month side build) — Across two quarters, parallel to delivery work: pick one client-pain pattern, validate it as a productized SaaS, ship a paid v1 to 5-10 customers..."
From a stable freelance income, validate and ship a SaaS product on the side, then taper client work month-by-month according to MRR triggers — without dropping below 6-month runway at any point.
From a stable freelance income, validate and ship a SaaS product on the side, then taper client work month-by-month according to MRR triggers — without dropping below 6-month runway at any point.

Engagement ending → client in-house team operates the product alone with code, runbooks, ADRs, on-call rota, training videos, and a 90-day defect SLA; vendor exits with a referenceable signed accep...

"Handover to client in-house team (3 weeks) — Engagement is ending. By the end of week 3, the client's in-house team is operating the product alone: code, runbooks, ADRs, on-call rota, training vide..."
"Move one or more clusters one minor (or major) version forward with zero customer-facing downtime: addons compatible, deprecated APIs removed, node images refreshed, rollback path proven."
Multi-month migration (monolith→services, on-prem→cloud, legacy stack→modern) → target system live with traffic cut over, rollback proven, legacy decom plan signed, performance + cost SLAs met, AI...

"Legacy-to-modern migration project (~3 months) — Vendor takes a multi-month migration: monolith to services, on-prem to cloud, or legacy stack (Struts / classic ASP / PHP4 / .NET Framework) to a cu..."
An established service is moved across a major version boundary (e.g. Django 4 to 5, React class to hooks, Go 1.x mod restructure) without losing behaviour, with zero unplanned downtime.
Migrate LLM provider / model generation. Move a production AI feature from model N to model N+1 (e.g.
Provider deprecates a model OR engineer wants to bump version (e.g. Claude 4.6 → 4.7, gpt-4o-mini → gpt-4.1-mini). Validate parity on eval set before flipping the switch.

Modernize a 2018-era QA suite into AI-augmented test ops. Audit existing test suite (pyramid shape, flake rate, coverage, contract gaps, a11y, visual, AI-feature blind spots), produce a remediation...
Plan and govern a phased decomposition of an existing monolith into bounded-context services. Done = strangler-fig program with at least 2 services in production behind feature flags, the original...

Move a single-vendor agent (e.g. Anthropic-only) to a portable runtime where Anthropic / OpenAI / local LLM can be swapped per-step or per-tenant, with fallback chain, cost-aware routing, and uncha...
Vendor-locked agent → portable runtime where Anthropic / OpenAI / local LLM swap per-step or per-tenant with fallback, cost-aware routing, unchanged eval bar.
v1 with flat retention and stalled growth → executed pivot (segment / feature / model / sunset) with brand intact.
Senior rotating off a project → produces a self-contained pack that lets the next person ship within a week.
2-3 person agency to sellable to strategic / acqui-hire / manager-operator within 6-12 months; same prep removes founder dependency even if not selling.

"QA automation framework migration (Cypress to Playwright). Done when: every active Cypress spec is either ported to Playwright, deleted as obsolete, or explicitly waived; CI runs only Playwright; f..."
All long-lived secrets moved off ad-hoc storage (env files, plaintext k8s Secrets, Jenkins creds) onto a centralized backend with short-lived tokens, rotation policy, audit trail, and CI/CD wiring.

"Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e.g. headless-commerce on Shopify Hydrogen, or AI integrations for SMB SaaS) with 2 case studies, a tightened portfolio, and a 30-5..."
"Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e."
"Engagement on T&M → client requests fixed-price for next phase → vendor lands a signed amendment without a margin haircut, with frozen requirements baseline, three-point estimate, risk reserves."

"T&M to fixed-price contract conversion (6 weeks) — Engagement is running on time-and-materials. Client requests conversion to fixed-price for the next phase. By end of week 6 Daria has: requirement..."
